raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Subjective Qualifying Adjectives","biasedText":"Things are unloaded from Air Force One after the plane, carrying President Donald Trump to the World Economic Form in Davos, experienced a minor electrical issue after departure... Trump will board a second plane to complete the trip.","explanation":"The caption presents the characterization “minor electrical issue” as fact without attribution, adopting the White House’s framing rather than signaling it as a claim."},{"biasType":"Bias by Omission","biasedText":"White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the decision to return was made after takeoff when the crew aboard Air Force One identified “a minor electrical issue” and, out of an abundance of caution, decided to turn around.","explanation":"The article relies solely on the White House account and includes no independent confirmation or technical detail from the Air Force, flight crew, FAA, or maintenance personnel, omitting perspectives that could corroborate or contextualize the severity of the issue."}]}

detections.biasedText: Things are unloaded from Air Force One after the plane, carrying President Donald Trump to the World Economic Form in Davos, experienced a minor electrical issue after departure... Trump will board a second plane to complete the trip.
detections.explanation: The caption presents the characterization “minor electrical issue” as fact without attribution, adopting the White House’s framing rather than signaling it as a claim.

detections.biasedText: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the decision to return was made after takeoff when the crew aboard Air Force One identified “a minor electrical issue” and, out of an abundance of caution, decided to turn around.
detections.explanation: The article relies solely on the White House account and includes no independent confirmation or technical detail from the Air Force, flight crew, FAA, or maintenance personnel, omitting perspectives that could corroborate or contextualize the severity of the issue.
